security.csp: default-src 'self' https:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: https: blob:; connect-src 'self' https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co

bundle.shortDescription: Professional AI image generation and editing suite
bundle.longDescription: Gemini Visual Studio is a professional-grade AI image generation and editing suite powered by Google Gemini API. Generate 4K images, edit with AI, create avatars, and manage your creative studio.
